_description: The historical record of how The Analyst's handicapping model has evolved. Each factor's weighting is reviewed and updated monthly based on accumulated evidence. This table is the most direct representation of the agent's intellectual growth.

_schema.factor_name: string — human-readable name, e.g. 'Recent Form (Last 3 Runs)'
_schema.category: string — FORM | PACE | CLASS | CONNECTIONS | TRACK | CONDITIONS | BARRIER | WEIGHT
_schema.current_weight: number — relative weighting 0.0 to 1.0, all factors should sum to 1.0 within a category
_schema.initial_weight: number — the weight assigned at inception
_schema.weight_history: array of objects — {date, weight, reason_for_change, supporting_races}
_schema.supporting_races: integer — number of races used to validate current weight
_schema.notes: string — qualitative context for current weighting

factors.notes: Initial weight pending calibration from operational experience.
